content:
SOCIAL MEDIA AGREEMENT OF COLLABORATION

“NEW PAKISTAN”



This Agreement of collaboration is between

Party no 1: Primary Owner/Fidyan Naeem		

Party No 2: Faizan Naeem

Party no 3: Shahbaz Baig 

Party no 4: Ahmad Rao



Purpose:

The “New Pakistan” Agreement of collaboration is for the sole purpose of enhancing the online visibility and earning through digital platforms and All parties agree that the new platform called New Pakistan and all parties will: 

1) Work Together by sharing our expertise equally to create, regulate, market, promote content for the sake of digital earnings.

2) For which all parties are agrees on the following points/ terms and conditions



General Terms and Conditions:

All the tangible and intangible assets except invested, created with seed money will belongs to New Pakistan and parties including Facebook Page, YouTube Channel and Website.

All the tangible and intangible assets except invested, created with seed money will belongs to New Pakistan and parties including Facebook Page, YouTube Channel and Website.

Any Party can leave “New Pakistan” after 1 Year prior to the notice of one month with services Furthermore he'll be able to get his prescribed revenue share for next 12 months as a reward of his services and contribution, after leaving and he will not be able to claim any tangible and intangible asset after 12 months of grace period. In case of returning back within the grace period his share will be cut half of the prior share by default or can be decided by all parties mutually.

To make any kind of new decision or to amend any existing decision or any new idea, three votes out of four will be required out of four parties to execute, failing which failing which will be liable for consequences in shape of revenue cut as penalty from the share mutually decided by parties later.

After completion of Seed money investment period, all parties will get profit accordingly after deduction of all expenses with the net profit. 15 percent of the gross revenue will be fixed for expenditures on monthly basis which will be used for hiring/gadgets or equipment purchasing, staff salaries, bills, travelling, or any other expenses with the consent of all parties.

In case of more investment needed after the seed money investment for 4 months, Faizaan Naeem can be offered more percentage in consideration of further investment that will be decided mutually by parties. In case of partner addition all parties will decide mutually before taking decision.

Transparency and honesty is the key to business and mandatory for all parties making any deal internally and externally with mutual consent and all parties have right to access any data of clients and accounts equally.

New Pakistan will be the first Priority to work for all parties in case of no availability, no compliance of tasks assigned to any party, he will provide alternative source or manage it with alternative person, failing which will be liable for penalty under negligence and revenue cut formula will be applied which is decided mutually.

All Parties understands and acknowledges that Social media performance like reach and likes depends upon the content posted on social media platforms that’s why all parties will put their full and effective efforts in making viral content, posting marketing, sharing, etc. 



Responsibilities of Parties:

Party no 1 is responsible of

Party no 2 is responsible of

Party no 3 is responsible of

Party no 4 is responsible of 

Other joint responsibility is…..



Percentage:

Party no 1 :	30%

Party no 2 :	10%

Party no 3 :	30%

Party no 4 :	30% 



Principal Officer:

Party no 4 is responsible of 

Other joint responsibility is…..



Percentage:

Party no 1 :	30%

Party no 2 :	10%

Party no 3 :	30%

Party no 4 :	30% 



Principal Officer:

Party no 1 will be the principal officer to deal all the technical and non-technical issues and can decide the urgent matters upon non availability of other parties in the larger interest of business. 



Term of This Agreement

This agreement is valid for the term of _____ years but will be review after 4 months on completion of seed money investment.

This agreement can be extended after mutual consent.

This agreement can be revoke after mutual consent at any time. 

On revocation all assets except intangible assets will be divided into four parties according to the shares prescribed. 







Party no 1							Party no 2



Fidyan Naeem						Faizan Naeem



Signature_________________				Signature__________________   







Party no 3							Party no 4



Shahbaz Baig						Ahmad Rao

Party no 1							Party no 2



Fidyan Naeem						Faizan Naeem



Signature_________________				Signature__________________   







Party no 3							Party no 4



Shahbaz Baig						Ahmad Rao



Signature_________________				Signature__________________



Witness no 1							Witness no 2



Name								Name



Signature_________________				Signature__________________

From

Irfan Bashir Bhatti S/o Muhammad Bashir Bhatti R/O 702-3-D2, Green Town Lahore.

CNIC: 17301-1374268-7, Phone: 03377252555

To

Syed Raheel Asghar S/O Syed Asghar Ali Shah, R/O 318-A1-Township, Lahore.

CNIC: 35202-2586400-1 Phone: 03004176979



Subject: 	AUTHORIZATION LETTER FOR VEHICLE USE 



Dear Sir,



I, Irfan Bashir Bhatti, am the legal owner of the vehicle with the following details:



Make: Suzuki 

Model: Wagon R 

Year: 2017

Color: white 

Registration No: LEA-17-5870A

 

I am writing this letter to authorize and grant permission Syed Raheel Asghar to use my vehicle mentioned above for a period of 20 days, starting from 19-12-2023 to 9-01-2024. The purpose of this authorization personal use or business travel, etc.

During this period, Syed Raheel Asghar is granted full access to the vehicle and is responsible for its safe and lawful use. Any necessary maintenance or repairs required during this period will be the responsibility of Syed Raheel Asghar.

Please find enclosed the following documents to support this authorization:

A photocopy of the vehicle registration papers.

A photocopy of my driver's license.

I trust that Syed Raheel Asghar will comply with all traffic laws and regulations while using the vehicle. In the event of any damage or issues during this period Syed Raheel Asghar agrees to inform me immediately.

This authorization is valid only for the specified duration mentioned above. Any use of the vehicle beyond this period requires additional written authorization.

I appreciate your cooperation in this matter and thank you for your understanding. Please feel free to contact me on above mention contact number. If you have any questions or need further clarification.



Sincerely,







IRFAN BASHIR BHATTI 

17301-1374268-7

IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL MAGISTRATE, SECTION 30, MODEL TOWN COURTS, LAHORE



















Crl. Misc.No ________________/B/2013

OMER SHAHBAZ S/O Shahbaz Ali, Caste Gujar R/O 21, Acre Scheme, House No 16, Samanabad Lahore presently confined in Kotlakhpat Jail Lahore

	………… (Petitioner)

	VERSUS	

The State

………. (Respondent)

According to remand paper dated 19-02-2013

Cross Version of Case FIR No:-64/13

………… (Petitioner)

	VERSUS	

The State

………. (Respondent)

According to remand paper dated 19-02-2013

Cross Version of Case FIR No:-64/13 

Offence U/S: - 324 PPC. 337 H2, 427, 342, 148,149

Police Station: - Lyton Road Lahore 



PETITION UNDER SECTION 497 Cr.P.C. FOR POST ARREST BAIL

Respectfully Sheweth,

That above mentioned Cross version was registered against the petitioner due to ulterior motive of assailants as well as the prosecution. Photocopy of the application of cross version and FIR are attached and marked as Annexure-A and B

That the accused/ petitioner is arrested in this case on 15-02-2013 and sent to judicial lock up on 19/02/2013 and no more required for further investigation and prays for his post arrest bail inter alia on the following 







GROUNDS

That the petitioner has falsely been involved in the above mentioned case with the mala fide intentions and ulterior motives.

That the petitioner is innocent and has committed no offence whatsoever.

That the petitioner is innocent and has committed no offence whatsoever. 

That actually the petitioner is victim of this incident and this cross version is after thought and presented after the four days of incident just to save their skins.

That in state case all the accused person have been declared guilty in two successive investigations and 395, 337 f5 and 365 ppc have also been added in state case.

That according to police complainant of cross version was the aggressor party and strong enmity also make the case of further inquiry.

 That just to save their skin from the punishment complainant of cross examination has managed this false stance with malafide intentions.

That two other accused persons have already been enlarged on bail by the honourable court.

That nothing has been recovered from the possession of petitioner and recovery shown if any is in violation of section 103 Cr.P.C

That nothing has been recovered from the possession of petitioner and recovery shown if any is in violation of section 103 Cr.P.C 

That no reasonable grounds existed to believe that accused/petitioner in circumstances, had committed non-bail able offence rather, grounds were available for further inquiry into the guilt of accused. Reliance upon K.L.R. 2005 Criminal Cases 191 Lahore

That the case of the petitioner requires further probe into his guilt within the purview of Section 497 (2) Cr.P.C.

That the petitioner is a law-abiding citizen of Pakistan and seeks concession of bail.

That the petitioner is previously non-convicted and there is no apprehension of the petitioner abscondence or tempering with the prosecution evidence if the petitioner is admitted to bail.

That the petitioner is ready to furnish surety bonds to the entire satisfaction of this Learned Court if admitted to bail. 

Any other grounds will be advance at the time of arguments.



PRAYER:-

That the petitioner is ready to furnish surety bonds to the entire satisfaction of this Learned Court if admitted to bail. 

Any other grounds will be advance at the time of arguments.



PRAYER:-



Under the circumstances it is therefore, respectfully prayed that the petitioner may kindly be released on bail till the final decision of the case.     



Petitioner 

Through





Tahir Pervaiz Malik 			        Muhammad Suleman Akash

     LLM						          LLM

PLH.CC.NO 20538					            PLH CC NO  42692







Rana Muhammad Nawaz 		   	                Mian Usman Ali  







Ch Azhar Abbas			    	   	      Malik Salman Ali Khan

PLH CC NO  44013



Rana Aftab Zahid			    	           Omer Pervaiz Malik

Advocates high court

Office No 1, First Floor, Bakhshi Tower

1 Fane Road Lahore

45 Model Town Courts, Lahore





CERTIFICATE:

As per instructions received from the petitioner this is second petition moved by the petitioner in this August Court on the titled subject.

45 Model Town Courts, Lahore





CERTIFICATE:

As per instructions received from the petitioner this is second petition moved by the petitioner in this August Court on the titled subject.





ADVOCATE.

--- Source: Get Legal Solution Website - NTN & Company Registration Documentary Requirements | Get Legal Solution ---

Partnership Firm (AOP)
Documents / Details Required
NTNs, Emails & Registered Phone numbers of All Partners.
Color copy of CNICs of Partners.
Verified/signed Partnership Deed.
Nomination & Authorization of Principal Officer.
Rent agreement / Ownership Documents of Business/Office Premises.
Latest paid Electricity Bill of Business Premises.
Private Limited Company (Pvt Ltd)
Documents / Details Required
SECP login details of Proposed Directors (if any).
Three Proposed Names for the Company.
Scanned CNICs, Phone, Email & Profession of all Directors.
Amount of Authorized and Paid-up Capital.
Percentage of Subscription in Capital.
Registered address of Proposed Company.
Business Activity and Value Per Share.
Name of the Chief Executive.
Single Member Company (SMC-Pvt Ltd)
Documents / Details Required
SECP login details of the Proposed Director (if any).
Three Proposed Names for the company.
Scanned CNIC, Phone, Email & Profession of Director.
Amount of Authorized and Paid-up Capital.
Registered address and Business Activity.
Limited Liability Partnership (LLP)
Documents / Details Required
Three Proposed Names.
Details of LLP – Business Activity, Address & Objectives.
Details of Partners – CNIC, Phone Number, Email, Profession & Shareholding.
Rent Agreement / Ownership evidence of Business Premises.
Utility Bill of the Business Premises.
Sales Tax / GST / STRN (FBR)
Documents / Details Required
Bank Account Maintenance Certificate.
Acquisition Date & Business Activity details.
GPS-tagged Photographs of the business premises.
Color copy of CNICs of Partners/Directors.
Rent agreement or ownership docs of Office premises.
Latest paid electricity bill.
Biometric Verification.
Latest Balance Sheet.
Consumer number with gas & electricity supplier + utility meter pictures.
Particulars of all branches (if any).
Authorization of Principal Officer.
GPS-tagged photographs of machinery (Manufacturer only).
Post Verification visit (Manufacturer only).
PRA – Punjab Revenue Authority
Requirements for Punjab Sales Tax Registration
Color copy of CNICs (Front + Back).
Phone Number, Email & Business Letterhead.
Utility Bill, Rent Agreement / Ownership evidence of Premises.
Bank Account Maintenance Certificate.
Acquisition Date & Business Activity.
PRA Registration Application.
Incorporation Certificate (for Pvt. Ltd Companies).
MOA and AOA (for Pvt. Ltd Companies).
Latest Form A & 9 (for Pvt. Ltd Companies).
Incorporation Certificate, MOA, AOA, Form A & 29 (Company — detailed list).
Rent agreement/ownership docs of Office premises.
Letterhead & Bank Account Certificate.
Particulars of all branches (if any).
Authorization of Principal Officer & Signed Application Form.
IPO Trademark (TM) Registration
Documents / Details Required
TM-1 Form in duplicate.
Six representations affixed on a durable paper of 13×8 inch.
CNIC of the Trademark Holder / partners.
Specification of goods or services sought to be protected in any class.
Residential address of holder or Letterhead of the Business.
Other Information or Documents as required.
IPO Copyrights Registration
Documents / Details Required
Demand Draft / Pay order of fee as applicable per work.
CNIC of the Copyrights Holder / partners.
NOC from publisher if work has been published and publisher is different from applicant.
Search certificate from Trademark Office if the work is capable of being used on goods.
Residential address of holder or Letterhead of the Business.
Other Information or Documents as required.
IPO Patent Registration
Documents / Details Required
Two Copies of work / invention description.
Demand Draft / Pay order of applicable fee.
CNIC of the Patent Holder / partners.
Technical disclosure of the invention (claims, abstract, drawings).
Residential address of holder or Letterhead of the Business.
Other Information or Documents as required during the process.
IPO Trademark Infringement Case
Documents / Details Required
Application to Director Enforcement.
IPO Registration Certificate.
Original LOGO / Trademark.
Fake Logo/Trademark (infringed copy).
Any other document required during the process.
NGO / NPO / Society / Trust / Foundation
Documents / Details Required
MOA and AOA of the Organization.
Authorization of President / Chairman.
Color copy of CNICs of all Members.
NADRA Biometric Verification of all Members.
Police Character Certificates of all Members.
Rent agreement / Ownership docs of Organization office.
Letterhead & latest paid electricity bill.
Phone Number and Email address of all members.
Phone number and email address of organization.
All Documents as required during the process.
Lahore Chamber of Commerce & Industries (LCCI)
Requirements for LCCI Membership
Application for grant of new membership (Business Letterhead).
Completely filled in membership form, duly proposed and seconded by two valid members.
CNICs of Proprietor / Partners / Directors.
NTN Certificate of Sole Proprietor.
NTN Certificate of Company/Firm along with NTN Certificates of Directors/Partners.
Sales-Tax Registration certificate (if applicable).
Utility Bill of Business Premises.
MOA, AOA, Form 9 and Incorporation Certificate (for Private Limited Company).
Respective Business Bank Account Maintenance Certificate.
Authority letter (Business Letterhead).
PSEB – Pakistan Software Export Board
Documents / Details Required
Company / Business NTN issued by FBR.
CNIC of all Directors / Partners / Proprietor.
Attested copy of MOA, AOA, Form-A, 29 and Incorporation Certificate (Companies only).
Attested copy of Form-C and Partnership deed (for Partnership firms).
Business Bank Statement of last six months or Bank Account Maintenance Letter/Certificate.
Comprehensive Business Profile (including Name, Designation, Number of Managerial Staff).
P@SHA – Pakistan IT Industry Association
Documents / Details Required
Membership Category selection.
CNIC, Name & Email of CEO and HR Head.
CNIC, Name & Email of Person in Charge (if CEO is not available).
Company Profile (including Address, Email, Phone number etc.).
NTN and STRN Certificate, Form-C of Company.
Last 3 Online Submitted Income Tax Returns or Projected Domestic & Export Revenue.
Name & Phone Number of Proposer and Seconder Company (current P@sha Member).
Details of Key Services/Products and their URLs.
Country of Business (i.e. China, UAE etc.).
PPRA – Public Procurement Regulatory Authority
Documents / Details Required
Open PPRA (EPADS) website with CNIC, User & Business name, Mobile no, valid Email and Password.
NTN Inquiry from FBR.
Active Status Income & Sales Tax.
Yearly Income Tax Return.
Taxpayer Registration Certificate.
PSW – Pakistan Single Window
Documents / Details Required
NTN of Firm/Business.
CNIC: Principal Officer / Sole Proprietor.
Mobile No. (As per FBR records).
Biometric verification Slip (FBR–PSW).
Bank Maintenance Certificate.
Email & Mobile No. (used for bank account registration).
SECP Company Easy Exit (Dissolution)
Documents / Details Required
Board Resolution regarding Dissolution of company (Printed on Company Letterhead and signed by all members).
Affidavit by CEO that No outstanding legal, financial, and statutory obligations on part of the company (Duly printed on Stamp paper and signed by CEO).
Board Resolution regarding closure of Company's Official Bank Account (Printed on Company Letterhead and signed by all members).
Auditor's Certificate.
Corporate Matters & Litigation Services
Income Tax matters (Audits, Replies to Notices of Tax Assessment / Recovery / Penalties, Appeals).
Sales Tax matters (Audits, Replies to Notices of Tax Assessment / Recovery / Penalties, Appeals).
Professional Tax matters (Certifications, Replies to Notices of Tax Assessment / Recovery / Penalties).
Corporate Tax Disputes (i.e. Withholding Tax etc.).
Customs and Excise Matters.
Property Tax (Replies to Notices of Recovery / Penalties etc.).
Tax Fraud and Evasion Cases.
Tax Recovery and Enforcement.
Miscellaneous Tax-Related & Other Litigations.

--- Source: Get Legal Solution Website - Privacy Policy | Get Legal Solution ---

Last Updated: April 15, 2026
Welcome to Get Legal Solution (GLS). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy informs you how we look after your personal data when you visit our website or interact with our automated social media systems.
We may collect, use, store, and transfer different kinds of personal data about you, including:
Identity Data: Name, professional title, and business name.
Contact Data: Email address and telephone numbers.
Technical Data: IP address, browser type, and location data when interacting with our online portals.
Query Data: Information you provide when requesting legal consultations or tax services.
3. Use of Automation (GLS Social Engine)
Our automated social media systems (Meta Integration) are used to provide timely legal updates and handle basic service inquiries. Any data shared with our AI-driven assistants is processed locally and used solely to draft professional responses for our attorneys to review.
As a law firm, we prioritize attorney-client privilege. We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used, or accessed in an unauthorized way.
This website may include links to third-party portals (such as the FBR Iris portal or SECP e-services). We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.
If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us:
CEO: Omer Pervaiz Malik

                Phone: +92 301 4991700
                Address: Plot 680, Sector D2, Green Town, Lahore, Pakistan.

Last Updated: May 04, 2026
1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing the services of Get Legal Solution (GLS), whether through our physical office or digital portals, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
2. Legal & Tax Services
GLS provides professional consultancy in areas including but not limited to:
Corporate Registration (SECP, PRA, FBR)

3. Client Responsibilities
To ensure the accuracy of legal filings, clients are responsible for providing authentic and timely documentation. GLS is not liable for penalties incurred due to the submission of incorrect data or delays caused by the client.
Professional fees are communicated upfront. Unless otherwise agreed in writing, fees for statutory filings and legal drafting are non-refundable once the process has been initiated with the respective government departments.
5. Limitation of Liability
While we strive for 100% accuracy, GLS acts as an intermediary between the client and statutory bodies. We are not liable for changes in government policy, portal downtimes, or judicial decisions that may affect the outcome of your case or filing.
